description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Upload Python Package that triggers on release creation. The workflow should have three jobs: deploy-sdist, deploy-bdist-manylinux, and deploy-bdist-windows. Each job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, install dependencies, build the package, and upload it to PyPI using twine with PYPI_USERNAME and PYPI_PASSWORD from secrets.
